summary: Comprehensive testing of Panel Extractor mobile app. Backend API: 100% passing (20/20 tests). Frontend: All screens load correctly, navigation working, marker placement functional, folder views displaying panels. Integration between frontend and backend verified. One minor code issue fixed (logger initialization order).

react_native_issues.issue: disabled prop doesn't prevent clicks in web preview (React Native Web limitation), but validation works via Alert on click
react_native_issues.priority: LOW - validation works at both frontend (alert) and backend levels

critical_code_review_comments: All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, Image)
All testID attributes present for testing
Proper error handling in API calls with try-catch blocks
Environment variables used correctly (EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, MONGO_URL, DB_NAME)
Dark theme applied consistently with good contrast ratios
Fixed: Logger was used before initialization - moved logging setup to top of server.py

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all navigation, marker placement, folder views working)

seed_data_creation: Test data created: 11 source images and 5 folders with panels. All test images prefixed with TEST_ for easy identification and cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. Backend APIs tested with pytest (20 tests, all passing). Frontend tested with Playwright on mobile viewport (375x667). Navigation, marker placement, panel extraction all working. Test data exists in MongoDB. Note: TouchableOpacity disabled state in web preview doesn't prevent clicks but validation still works via alerts and backend checks.

backend_tests_passed: POST /api/images/upload - accepts base64 and returns metadata
GET /api/folders - lists folders with panel counts
GET /api/folders/{id} - returns folder detail with panels
POST /api/process with 4 even markers - extracts 2 panels successfully
POST /api/process with 3 odd markers - returns 400 error
POST /api/process with 6 markers - extracts 3 panels successfully
frontend_tests_passed: Home page loads with Panel Extractor title
EXTRACTED PANELS section visible and showing 5 folders
SOURCE SCREENSHOTS section visible and showing 11 source images
Import FAB button visible at bottom right
Clicking source screenshot navigates to /editor
Editor page loads with image displayed
Add Marker button visible and functional
Process button visible
Marker placement working - badge updates correctly
Markers displayed as red horizontal lines on image
Cut here reference line visible at screen center
Back navigation from editor to home works
Clicking folder card navigates to folder detail
Folder view shows panels grid with correct panel count
Panel thumbnails displayed correctly
Back navigation from folder to home works
Undo marker button functional
Clear markers button visible
Marker count badge shows correct count and warning for odd
Extract button shows correct panel count
design_review_passed: Touch targets minimum 44x44px - all buttons meet requirement
Text contrast excellent - white (#f4f4f5) on dark (#09090b)
Dark theme (#09090b background, #18181b surface) applied consistently
Primary color (#ef4444 red) used for markers and CTAs
Card design with proper border radius (10px) and borders
FAB positioned correctly with proper elevation shadow
ScrollView for long images works smoothly
SafeAreaView used for proper notch handling
